title: Azure Entra ID role assignment
description: One record per (principal, role, scope) directory-role / RBAC assignment in Microsoft Entra ID, plus the service-principal / app-registration inventory facts needed to interpret it. Pulled read-only from Microsoft Graph (Directory.Read.All + Application.Read.All). Config + assignment metadata only — never mailbox/profile PII. The platform evaluator decides pass/fail per (control, assignment); the connector emits descriptive (INCONCLUSIVE) records.

assignment_id.description: Stable id of the role assignment.

principal_id.description: Object id of the assigned principal.

principal_display_name.description: Human label of the assignment's principal (the name needed to read the assignment record — not mailbox/profile PII).

role_definition_id.description: Directory-role template id or RBAC role-definition id.

role_display_name.description: Human-readable role name (e.g. Global Administrator, Reader).

directory_scope_id.description: Scope of the assignment: '/' (tenant) or an administrative-unit / app scope id.

is_privileged.description: Connector-side heuristic: the role is a known high-privilege directory role.

tenant_id.description: Entra tenant id the assignment lives in.
